title: Banana's PVP Essentials
body:
## What this pack does?
This pack gives you all the essentials you need for an enjoyable pvp experience (that is, if you aren't having fun because skill issue)

Some notable features include:
- Lower fire
- Short swords
- Less obtrusive totem pop and weather
- Small items and utils
- 3d Crystal 
- Simple netherite armor
- no pumpkin overlay
- Simple anchors

### Credits
See readme.txt
